title: Serialize runtime tests and wire ASan bridge archive

source.subject: fix(ci): serialize runtime tests and wire ASan bridge archive in superrepo

body:
## What shipped

Runtime test jobs serialize execution and link the ASan bridge archive so AddressSanitizer builds do not race or miss symbols on Linux CI.

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `e8bc073`

> fix(ci): serialize runtime tests and wire ASan bridge archive in superrepo

## Completed

2026-05-24 (catalog cutoff window).
